utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections clearly labeled. Each section is fully detailed: (1) property includes multiple options with location, price, size, bedrooms, features, and fees; (2) financing includes type, down payment, loan amount, rate, monthly payment, and term; (3) legal_services includes provider, services, and cost; (4) moving_services includes provider, services, and cost; (5) setup_services includes utilities and setup fees; (6) total_budget includes all relevant cost components and a total. Therefore, all six items are present and fully specified.

These names do not appear verbatim in the ground-truth ratings list. Therefore, we must map them to the closest equivalents under 'purchase_properties' based on their characteristics (price, size, and style). The legal service 'Toronto Real Estate Law Group' providing review, title search, and closing coordination aligns with 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service 'Downtown Movers Toronto' (packing, local transport, setup assistance) best matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 9).
